instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate cooling when oil temperature rises.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate cooling system when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Cooling_Threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall increase cooling intensity at high temperature.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase cooling fan speed when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds High_Temp_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate oil pump cooling strategy.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase oil pump flow when temperature exceeds Cooling_Threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce load when overheating occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall request torque reduction when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Critical_Temp.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable aggressive shifting during overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit kickdown when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds High_Temp_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor cooling effectiveness.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect cooling fault when temperature continues rising after cooling activation.

L4_requirements: IF Cooling_System_Active = TRUE AND Transmission_Oil_Temp > Cooling_Threshold THEN Monitor_Temperature_Rate
IF Temperature_Rise_Rate > Rate_Limit THEN Cooling_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate maximum cooling at extreme temperatures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate maximum cooling when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Extreme_Temp.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate cooling system faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify cooling fault source when Cooling_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe operation during overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain safe gear when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Critical_Temp.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear thermal faults when temperature returns to safe level.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear thermal fault when Transmission_Oil_Temp falls below Cooling_Threshold.
